sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19041" key="baquko/mhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰθῠ-κόμης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου,</itype> <sense id="n19041.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with thick hair,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
